Tests that `Math.acos(-7)` returns `NaN` in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.acos` function in JavaScript. It checks that the function returns `NaN` (Not-a-Number) when given an input of `-7`, which is outside the valid range for the arccosine function. The use of `assert` ensures that the test will fail if `Math.acos(-7)` does not return `NaN`, indicating an unexpected behavior. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical edge case.
